element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Button-hold then joystick motion (or reverse in later arcade revisions)
Eating enemy worshippers grants health bonus and score; eating own worshippers penalizes
Performed after opponent defeat using similar input method to special moves
Fight all seven monsters sequentially with enhanced power bar from minigame
Eat worshippers to maximize health before endurance match
Triggered by specific human player actions; optional content

typical_tension_triggers: Special move inputs required under pressure
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Match-based tension cycles with escalating difficulty in campaign mode. Single matches progress from opening neutral state to climactic finishing move. Campaign rhythm builds through increasing opponent difficulty, punctuated by minigame breaks (worshipper eating pre-final battle). Victory/defeat binary creates sharp relief or restart tension.

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Easter egg minigames triggered by human player interaction rather than explicit UI prompts
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Human volleyball and bowling minigames activated through specific character/crowd interactions

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introductory CPU opponents with basic attack patterns; player learns special move inputs and worshipper mechanics
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Incremental difficulty scaling; CPU opponents demonstrate specialized character abilities and increased AI aggression
difficulty_curve.late_game: Final boss fights available only at difficulty level 10 or higher; character-specific domain stages reflect narrative stakes
notable_spikes: Final endurance battle (fight all 7 monsters sequentially) accessible only at difficulty 10+, with power bar mitigation via worshipper minigame
First match against each new character introduces their unique move set and fighting style

notable_level_patterns.description: Seven unique background stages, each representing one playable character's innate domain (Cliff/Blizzard, Hollows/Armadon, Strip/Talon, Cove/Sauron, Ruins/Chaos, Tomb/Vertigo, Inferno/Diablo). Background reflects thematic relationship to character mythology.

Single-player mode presents sequential 1v1 matches against CPU opponents with increasing difficulty. Campaign culminates in optional endurance round (difficulty 10+) where player fights all monsters sequentially with power boost from preceding minigame.

During fights, human tribesmen appear as interactive environmental elements. Player can consume enemy worshippers for health/score bonus or own worshippers for score penalty. Creates risk/reward decision-making during matches.

Worshipper eating minigame preceding final endurance battle functions as tension relief valve and strategic preparation phase. Hidden easter egg minigames (volleyball, bowling) activated through crowd/character interaction.
